name: ontology
tagline: Popular ClawHub skill (650★): a typed knowledge graph for structured agent memory and composable recall.
verdict: Middling trust. It never states what it's out of scope for despite casting a wide net, so it can trigger on tasks it wasn't built for. It also lacks any version history, and it calls python3 and a script without checking they exist.

highlights.summary: No out-of-scope guidance despite broad triggers — high misfire risk.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes.
python3 and a bundled script are invoked with no requirements note or availability check.
